scripts.test:build-ai: deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x1.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x2.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x3.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-C.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-J.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-L.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-PLUS.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-S.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-SR.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:cannon-cursor && npm run test:e2e:banner && npm run test:e2e:lockout
scripts.test:parallel: bash -c 'deno test --no-check test/headless.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/determinism.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/territory.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/scenario.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/scenario-camera.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/scenario-online.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/modern-mode.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/checkpoint-parity.test.ts -- 42 & wait'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:scenario && npm run test:determinism && npm run test:headless && npm run test:territory && npm run test:build-ai && npm run test:online && npm run test:e2e:local:quick
scripts.lint:all: tsc --noEmit && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:unused && npm run lint:circular && npm run lint:duplicates && npm run lint:literals && npm run lint:layers && npm run lint:domains && npm run lint:imports && npm run lint:architecture && npm run lint:restricted && npm run lint:phase-transitions && npm run lint:typeof && npm run lint:null-init && npm run lint:battle-events && npm run lint:features && npm run lint:modifiers && npm run lint:cannon-modes && npm run lint:deno && npm run lint:deno-lint
scripts.reorder:changed: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- 'src/*.ts' | xargs -I{} deno run -A scripts/reorder-file.ts {}
